description_long: A muscular adult male figure stands confidently, shirtless, revealing intricate gold tattoos across his chest, arms, and back. He wears a black face mask and sports a spiked, voluminous hairstyle. His forearms are adorned with ornate, armored bracers featuring gold detailing. He is dressed in loose, cropped black pants with a utility belt and various pouches, and his feet are clad in casual sneakers. The overall appearance is urban and stylish, blending street fashion with elements of fantasy or combat gear. His posture and accessories suggest agility and readiness, making him stand out in an urban environment.
description: A shirtless, muscular male with gold tattoos, armored bracers, cropped black pants, and a face mask, exuding an urban, combat-ready style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold tattoos on the chest, face mask, bracers, utility belt, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm tattoos, bracer details, and the profile of the hairstyle.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the full extent of the back tattoos, the belt, and the cropped pants.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the right arm's tattoos, bracer, and the side profile of the pants and hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: urban cropped pants with utility belt, armored bracers, and face mask
